texto: I always wanted to play a boxer because some of my favorite films, as a boy, were those great boxing movies, like 'Raging Bull', 'Rocky', 'The Set Up', 'Fat City and Hard Times'. I just loved those films.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Holt McCallany: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I always wanted to play a boxer because some of my favorite films, as a boy, were those great box…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, great, city pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de city e play.
